name: Italian Sour Cream Cake (Xwcg89a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Generously grease a 10-inch tube pan.
3. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add brown sugar and beat until stiff peaks form (about 3 minutes).
4. Fold in coconut and ground pecans. Spread meringue on the bottom and up the sides of the pan, leaving about 1 inch from the top.
5. In a large bowl, combine cake mix, sour cream, amaretto, water, egg yolks, and additional egg whites. Mix until moistened (low speed) and then beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
6. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 55 to 65 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool upright in the pan for 10 minutes, then loosen sides and invert onto a serving plate. Allow it to cool completely.
8. In a small bowl, blend powdered sugar, cocoa, amaretto, softened butter/margarine, corn syrup, and water until reaching the desired spreading consistency. Spread over the top of the cake, allowing some to run down the sides. Garnish with ground pecans and cherries.
